{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603241157274248EA0ED52CA1DBEFA8\"}"},"total":10944},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7102821177021874983","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"对于人物性格的塑造，写的非常清楚。把所有的爱恨情仇，剪不断理还乱的，又鲜明的溶于文字里。对于命运的无奈安排，这种宿命论的神秘感，悄悄然跃然于字里行间。写的非常精彩"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1653754624,"group_id":"6758016181212285965","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3LFLCj+gIFveF8c4fiCIPUzPcqn6TLVx/7Is7So6g25","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776873648\u0026x-signature=PE4Lf3CdmV2eVKh7syh5Tz4y2hU%3D","user_id":"1742090732046107","user_name":"玫兰博苑"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1742090732046107","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6758016181212285965","book_info":{"abstract":"一个夏日的雨夜，他救了熟睡的女领导，本以为是一段奇缘，不曾想却惹上了一身麻烦，更可怕的是，竟然落入了一个精心打造的圈套，让他陷入了前所未有的危机之中......没根基，没靠山，没人脉，没资源，一个农村走出来的打工者，一步步走向人生的巅峰。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b623669336d3e5a953f280cff739d0e9","author":"卷帘西风1","author_id":"","book_id":"6758016181212285965","book_name":"商海风云","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":261,\"name\":\"都市日常\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261\u0026name=都市日常\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=
